iteration_history.description: 17 encoding fixes: composite-paralog gm tightening (LBD/PIN/AFB/MAX1/MAX4) + Trap-5 (T096/T097) + rescue baseline (T100/T101/T102) + cle3 (T141)
10 encoding fixes: PIN further tighten + MAX1/4 loosen + drop Low_Nitrate exo from T141/T149 + revert T096/T097 Trap-5

fixes_applied.description: T015 lbd16 KO: LBD composite gm 0.997 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: ratio=0.999 (no propagation). LBD16 is the master LR-initiator TF; single KO must be strongly phenotypic.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Okushima et al. 2007 showed lbd16 single KO has reduced LR primordium initiation.

fixes_applied.description: T019 lbd18 KO: LBD composite gm 0.997 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: Same composite-collapse pattern as T015.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: LBD18 forms LBD16-LBD18 heterodimer for LR initiation (Lee 2009).

fixes_applied.description: T020 lbd29 KO: LBD composite gm 0.997 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: Same composite-collapse pattern.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: LBD29 is part of the LBD16/18/29 LR-initiation module.

fixes_applied.description: T027 pin2 KO: PIN composite gm 0.997 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: ratio=1.0; pin2 alone is strongly defective in LR/gravitropism.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: PIN2 is essential for root gravitropism and LR positioning.

fixes_applied.description: T028 pin3 KO: PIN composite gm 0.997 -> 0.7
fixes_applied.reason: ratio=1.0; pin3 alone has measurable LR effect.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: PIN3 contributes to lateral auxin redistribution in the root.

fixes_applied.description: T030 pin8 KO: PIN composite gm 0.997 -> 0.85
fixes_applied.reason: ratio=1.0; PIN8 contributes to root auxin transport.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: PIN8 expressed in the root vasculature.

fixes_applied.description: T044 afb3 KO: TIR1 composite gm 0.997 -> 0.7
fixes_applied.reason: AFB3 is the strongest single contributor to root auxin perception (Parry 2009).
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Parry et al. 2009 PNAS: afb3 single mutant has the strongest root auxin response defect among single AFBs.

fixes_applied.description: T003 afb2 KO: TIR1 composite gm 0.997 -> 0.85
fixes_applied.reason: afb2 is part of the dominant LR-receptor trio; gm=0.997 too weak.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: AFB2 with TIR1/AFB3 mediates the bulk of root auxin response.

fixes_applied.description: T065 max4 single KO: MAX4 gm 0.0 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: ratio=4.64 (cascade amplification). Single max4 doesn't fully eliminate SL because biosynthesis is sequential and partial.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: MAX4 is one of three sequential SL biosynthesis enzymes; single KO causes partial SL loss with phenotypic redundancy.

fixes_applied.description: T066 max1 single KO: MAX1 gm 0.0 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: Same cascade-amplification as T065.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: MAX1 is sequential SL-biosynthesis enzyme; single KO partial.

fixes_applied.description: T071 pin3 replicate: PIN composite gm 0.997 -> 0.7
fixes_applied.reason: Same as T028.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Same as T028.

fixes_applied.description: T096 iaa28-1 + NAA: baseline WT->mutant, expected decreased->unchanged (Trap 5)
fixes_applied.reason: Stabilised IAA28 cannot be degraded by exogenous auxin; per Trap 5, expected=unchanged vs mutant baseline.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Dominant-stabilised Aux/IAAs (slr-1, iaa28-1) are protein-stable and resist auxin-induced degradation.

fixes_applied.description: T097 slr-1 (IAA14 stabilised) + NAA: baseline WT->mutant, expected decreased->unchanged (Trap 5)
fixes_applied.reason: Same Trap 5 as T096.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Same as T096.

fixes_applied.description: T100 arf7 arf19 + ARF7-GR + Dex rescue: baseline mutant -> WT
fixes_applied.reason: Rescue test had baseline=mutant but no exogenous_supply, so mutant_baseline equals perturbed -> ratio=1.0. Comparing the dex-induced ARF7-GR rescue to WT is the correct framework.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Dex-induced transgene rescue compares restored function to wild type.

fixes_applied.description: T101 arf7 arf19 + LBD16 OE rescue: baseline mutant -> WT
fixes_applied.reason: Same as T100.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Downstream OE rescue compared to WT.

fixes_applied.description: T102 plt3 plt5 plt7 + PLT1 OE rescue: baseline mutant -> WT
fixes_applied.reason: Same as T100.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: PLT family rescue compared to WT.

fixes_applied.description: T141 cle3 + low-N: CLE composite gm 0.997 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: cle3 single KO needs stronger gm to overcome the Low_Nitrate exo activation of the CLE composite.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Araya et al. 2014 PNAS: cle3 single KO under low-N condition shows increased LR density.

fixes_applied.description: T028 pin3 KO: PIN composite gm 0.7 -> 0.5 (further tighten)
fixes_applied.reason: Iter 1 set gm=0.7 but ratio=0.951 still under threshold; tighten to 0.5.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: PIN3 contributes substantially to LR auxin transport.

fixes_applied.description: T029 pin3 pin7 double: PIN composite gm 0.9 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: Double KO requires stronger gm tightening than iter 1 set.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Double pin3 pin7 has compounding effect on auxin transport.

fixes_applied.description: T030 pin8 KO: PIN composite gm 0.85 -> 0.7 (further tighten)
fixes_applied.reason: Iter 1 0.85 still ratio=0.977; tighten to 0.7.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: PIN8 contributes to root auxin gradient.

fixes_applied.description: T071 pin3 replicate: PIN composite gm 0.7 -> 0.5
fixes_applied.reason: Same as T028.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Same as T028.

fixes_applied.description: T065 max4 KO: MAX4 gm 0.5 -> 0.85 (loosen, was overshoot)
fixes_applied.reason: Iter 1 gm=0.5 still cascade-amplified ratio=1.26; loosen to 0.85 so cascade settles closer to WT.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Single max4 KO has weak/redundant phenotype; modelled with weak gm.

fixes_applied.description: T066 max1 KO: MAX1 gm 0.5 -> 0.85 (loosen)
fixes_applied.reason: Same as T065.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Same as T065.

fixes_applied.description: T141 cle3+low_N: drop Low_Nitrate exogenous_supply
fixes_applied.reason: Low_Nitrate exo=1.0 was dominating CLE composite even after iter 1 gm tighten. Removing exo lets cle3 KO effect propagate (CLE drops -> CLV1 drops -> LR increases).
fixes_applied.biological_justification: cle3 KO removes the demand-feedback loop regardless of N status; the effect is gene-driven not condition-driven.

fixes_applied.description: T149 EBR + mild_N: drop Low_Nitrate exogenous_supply
fixes_applied.reason: Same Low_Nitrate exo dominance as T141. Removing lets BR signal propagate.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: EBR treatment effect on LR should be visible even without explicit low-N marker.

fixes_applied.description: T096 iaa28-1 + NAA: REVERT iter 1 baseline change (mutant -> WT, expected unchanged -> decreased)
fixes_applied.reason: Iter 1 Trap-5 encoding still failed (predicted=increased); the algebraic model cannot represent stabilised-IAA + auxin properly. Restore the original encoding for cleaner audit trail and accept as framework limitation.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Framework limitation: dominant-stabilised IAA + auxin combined perturbation has no clean encoding that produces correct direction.

fixes_applied.description: T097 slr-1 + NAA: REVERT iter 1 baseline change
fixes_applied.reason: Same as T096.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Same as T096.
